name: candid
description: Submits claims to Candid's API, pulls adjudication data, posts payments/adjustments back to Canvas, and reports patient payments.

handlers.description: On CLAIM_QUEUE_MOVED: schedule claim submission (QueuedForSubmission) or adjudication sync (Patient Balance).
On PATIENT_PAYMENT_PROCESSED: report the patient payment to Candid's API with claim allocations.
SimpleAPI endpoint that submits a claim to Candid after the grace period has elapsed.
Triggers full adjudication sync for a single claim.
Triggers patient payment sync for a single claim (async from queue move).
Reports a patient payment to Candid's API (async from payment event).
Serves Candid timeline data and triggers manual syncs for the claim timeline application.
Serves aggregated Candid claim data for the dashboard application.
Nightly cron (2 AM) that syncs adjudication data for all claims in FiledAwaitingResponse, AdjudicatedOpenBalance, and PatientBalance.
WebSocket for real-time claim timeline updates.
Serves HTML/CSS/JS for the Candid dashboard and claim-timeline applications.

applications.name: Candid Activity
applications.description: Shows Candid submission, adjudication, and payment activity for the current claim.

applications.name: Candid Dashboard
applications.description: Lists all claims submitted to Candid with their current status.
